message:
fix: batch resolve issues #7258-#7283 (security, memory, reliability) (#7342)

* fix: security and safety hardening for agent subsystems

- Add context timeout to kubectl Execute (#7258) and RenameContext (#7279)
- Add sync.RWMutex to KubectlProxy config to prevent data races (#7259)
- Reject exec-based auth in imported kubeconfigs to prevent RCE (#7260)
- Fix validateArgs to skip flags before config subcommand check (#7261)
- Add HTTP server timeouts to prevent Slowloris DoS (#7262)
- Fix killBackendProcess to return false when nothing killed (#7263, #7264)
- Use os.Executable() instead of go run for restart (#7265)
- Add recover() to synchronous WS handleMessage path (#7267)
- Add MaxBytesReader to handleAutoUpdateConfig POST (#7268)
- Use UnixNano for backup paths to avoid collisions (#7276)
- Add goroutine semaphore to bound WS work goroutines (#7277)
- Add writeJSONError helper for proper HTTP error codes (#7275)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: memory leaks, stale caches, and reliability improvements

- Add per-entry TTL to InsightWorker cache (#7270)
- Cap InsightWorker cache at 500 entries with LRU eviction (#7269)
- Use json.Decoder for robust LLM response parsing (#7272)
- Evict deleted nodes from DeviceTracker maps (#7274)
- Add context timeout to detectRepoPath/detectCurrentSHA (#7281)
- Add context timeout to executeDevReleaseUpdate git commands (#7280)
- Release Status() lock before network fetch to prevent stalls (#7282)
- Add ExitCode/Truncated fields to ChatResponse for CLI providers (#7273, #7278)
- Replace unnecessary fmt.Sprintf with strconv.Itoa in tests (#7283)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -71,6 +71,16 @@ type ChatResponse struct {
 
 	// Done indicates if the response is complete (for streaming)
 	Done bool `json:"done"`
+
+	// ExitCode is populated by CLI-based providers when the child process
+	// exits with a non-zero code. A non-zero value signals that the
+	// provider's command failed, even if partial output was captured (#7273).
+	ExitCode int `json:"exitCode,omitempty"`
+
+	// Truncated is set to true when the CLI output scanner hit an error
+	// (e.g. buffer overflow, read error) before the stream completed.
+	// Consumers should treat the Content as potentially incomplete (#7278).
+	Truncated bool `json:"truncated,omitempty"`
 }
 
 // ProviderTokenUsage tracks token consumption for a request
